Name: FFindFloorResult
Description: Data about the floor for walking movement, used by CharacterMovementComponent.

Variables.Name: bBlockingHit
Variables.Description:
True if there was a blocking hit in the floor test that was NOT in initial penetration.
	 The HitResult can give more info about other circumstances.

Variables.Name: bWalkableFloor
Variables.Description: True if the hit found a valid walkable floor.

Variables.Name: bLineTrace
Variables.Description: True if the hit found a valid walkable floor using a line trace (rather than a sweep test, which happens when the sweep test fails to yield a walkable surface).

Variables.Name: FloorDist
Variables.Description: The distance to the floor, computed from the swept capsule trace.

Variables.Name: LineDist
Variables.Description: The distance to the floor, computed from the trace. Only valid if bLineTrace is true.

Variables.Name: HitResult
Variables.Description: Hit result of the test that found a floor. Includes more specific data about the point of impact and surface normal at that point.
